signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows, the highest since January 2026, led by Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA, coinciding with a 7% ETH price climb to nearly $2,400 amid a broader market rally.[1]

signals.headline: Bitmine Buys 101,627 ETH in Largest 2026 Purchase | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitmine Buys 101,627 ETH in Largest 2026 Purchase | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Tom Lee's Bitmine Immersion Technologies acquired 101,627 ETH last week, its biggest buy of 2026, boosting holdings to nearly 5 million ETH (82% toward 5% of total supply).[2]  
This whale accumulation signals strong conviction, potentially influencing markets betting on ETH upside in April.[2]  
No other confirmations,
